title: Scientists
seoTitle: Consciousness Scientists: Grinberg, Targ, Persinger — Peer-Reviewed Evidence
seoTitle_es: Científicos de la consciencia: Grinberg, Targ, Persinger — evidencia revisada por pares
description: The researchers who built the evidence base for consciousness research — Grinberg, Swann, Puthoff, Radin, Sheldrake, Kastrup — and what their peer-reviewed work actually shows.
description_es: Los investigadores que construyeron la base empírica de la investigación de la consciencia — Grinberg, Swann, Puthoff, Radin, Sheldrake, Kastrup — y lo que su trabajo revisado por pares realmente muestra.
imagePrompt: Retrofuturist 1970s cinematic still photograph. Heavy 35mm grain, anamorphic lens flare, kodak ektachrome retro slide aesthetic. The chromatic zone is the ONLY saturated area — everything else is desaturated matte black with deep shadow. No recognizable face. Mysterious investigator-archive aesthetic. Photographic NOT painterly NOT illustrated. A dim 1980s consciousness-research laboratory dominates 70 percent of the frame in deep desaturated cobalt and matte black. Center: a workbench cluttered with vintage analog instruments — twin EEG monitors with glowing emerald-green oscilloscope traces, a tangle of colored electrode cables, a leather-bound lab notebook open to handwritten frequency equations, a faded UNAM (National Autonomous University of Mexico) crest on the wall behind. A single overhead fluorescent fails to fully illuminate the corners. The CRT traces + lab notebook + UNAM crest are the chromatic zone — emerald green, amber LED indicators, paper cream. Mood: Tarkovsky Stalker + Soderbergh Solaris 2002.
